rows.notes: Selected 'Annuagia recipienda' from gpt-5-mini. Its notes were more specific in acknowledging ambiguity, and visual verification confirms 'Annuagia' (without 's') is more accurate than gemini-flash's 'Annuagias'.

Visually verified description. 'Little Tew' from gpt-5-mini is more accurate than 'ditte Ten'. 'ast' from gemini-flash is more accurate than 'not'. Both extractors agreed on the row type and absence of amounts.

rows.description: Mr. Heywood 2 years & cepons included J -
